# {.unnumbered .unlisted}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\begin{center}

\vspace*{0.5cm}

{\fontsize{22}{28}\selectfont\bfseries Restoring native freshwater crayfish habitat\\[0.3cm]in invaded lake ecosystems}

\vspace{4.5cm}

{\fontsize{12}{20}\selectfont
A thesis submitted in fulfilment of the requirements\\[0.4cm]
for the degree of\\[0.6cm]
\textbf{Doctor of Philosophy}\\[0.2cm]
Te Aka Mātuatua --- School of Science\\[0.6cm]
at\\[0.6cm]
\textbf{The University of Waikato}\\[1.2cm]
by\\[0.6cm]
\textbf{Olivier V. Raven}
}

\vspace{3cm}

\includegraphics[width=6.5cm]{images/Waik_Word_RGB_V-New.jpg}

\vspace{2cm}

{\fontsize{12}{14}\selectfont 2026}

\end{center}
\newpage
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

**Restoring native freshwater crayfish habitat in invaded lake ecosystems**

&nbsp;

A thesis submitted in fulfilment of the requirements for the degree of

**Doctor of Philosophy**

Te Aka Mātuatua — School of Science

The University of Waikato

&nbsp;

**Olivier V. Raven**

&nbsp;

![](images/Waik_Word_RGB_V-New.jpg){width=6cm}

&nbsp;

2026

{{< pagebreak >}}

:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-height:82vh; text-align:center; padding:2rem 1rem;">

<h1 style="font-family:'Crimson Pro',Georgia,serif; font-size:2rem; font-weight:700; max-width:560px; line-height:1.45; margin:0 0 3.5rem;">
Restoring native freshwater crayfish habitat in invaded lake ecosystems
</h1>

<p style="font-family:'Crimson Pro',Georgia,serif; font-size:1.1rem; line-height:2.4; margin:0 0 2.5rem;">
A thesis submitted in fulfilment of the requirements<br>
for the degree of<br>
<strong>Doctor of Philosophy</strong><br>
Te Aka Mātuatua — School of Science<br>
at<br>
<strong>The University of Waikato</strong><br>
by<br>
<strong>Olivier V. Raven</strong>
</p>

<img src="images/Waik_Word_RGB_V-New.jpg" style="width:210px; margin:0 0 2.5rem;">

<p style="font-family:'Crimson Pro',Georgia,serif; font-size:1.1rem; margin:0;">2026</p>

</div>
:::
